name: codex-claude-delegate
description: Delegate implementation tasks to Claude Code from Codex CLI. Claude runs in an isolated git worktree, returns structured results, and Codex reviews before applying.

interface.shortDescription: Run tasks via Claude Code in isolated worktrees
interface.longDescription:
Codex CLI plans the task, then delegates execution to Claude Code through MCP tools. Claude works in an isolated git worktree with security constraints, runs tests, and returns structured results. Codex reviews the diff before applying changes to the main workspace.

Tools: claude_status, claude_setup, claude_runs, claude_run_inspect, claude_result, claude_workspace_status, claude_task, claude_review_gate, claude_query, claude_review, claude_implement, claude_jobs, claude_job_result, claude_job_cancel, claude_job_wait, claude_job_cleanup, claude_apply, claude_cleanup
defaultPrompt: Delegate this refactor to Claude Code using claude_implement
Ask Claude to review the current diff with claude_review
